title: Magex's Draconic Ghasts (Dragons)
description: This resource pack changes ghasts into rideable dragons!
body:
This resource pack changes ghasts into rideable dragons!

If you **enjoy** this resource pack, consider supporting me on [buymeacoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magex_ya)!

![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be8672e9a7ccc1db015a6d3c9383ce59d1b0b698.png)
# About
Magex's Draconic Ghasts Changes the Ghasts and Happy Ghasts model into Dragon mobs with **custom animations**!

# Features
- Changes the model of the Ghast
- Changes the model of the Happy Ghast
- Changes the model of the Dried Ghast
- Replaces the normal sounds of Ghasts and Happy Ghasts into Dragon roars!
- Adds (for now) 3 Dragon reskins depending on the harness you use: Black, White and Magenta

# Requirements
![REQUIREMENTS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5565ec4f08401f848919a99ff1872b81d89e19d4.png)
